scenarios.user_or_attacker_model: Parent uses v1.1 before and after a walk
scenarios.setup: Fresh SafariStore temp archive and starter quests
scenarios.command_or_harness: XCTest testRouteKitCreatesEditableCustomQuest, testCopyQuestResetsClueStatusAndPersists, testWalkRecapCountsProgressMomentsAndReplays; subagent /tmp Swift harness
scenarios.expected_signal: Route Kit creates custom quest; copy resets waiting clues; complete/skip/moment/replay recap persists
scenarios.actual_result: 8-test final run passed; subagent harness reported starter=3 custom=2 moments=1 recap=1 completed • 1 skipped • 1 Find Moments replay=1

scenarios.user_or_attacker_model: New local install or user reset state
scenarios.command_or_harness: Source readback plus subagent /tmp Swift harness
scenarios.expected_signal: Quests can be empty, premium unavailable, starter quests restore locally
scenarios.actual_result: Subagent harness reported restored quests=3 premium=unavailable; source preserves local-only reset/restore

scenarios.user_or_attacker_model: Parent taps route/copy actions multiple times
scenarios.setup: Temp archive, repeated createQuest(from:) and copyQuest(_:)
scenarios.expected_signal: Independent custom quest IDs; editable; all copied clues waiting; persisted reload

scenarios.setup: Invalid JSON written to temp archive URL
scenarios.expected_signal: No crash; starter quests/default premium restored; archive reload succeeds

scenarios.setup: Scan Swift sources and dependency manifests
scenarios.actual_result: static scan status PASS with only allowlisted negative non-goal copy

scenarios.user_or_attacker_model: Old PASS evidence conflicts with current source
scenarios.setup: Compare branch/head/status and regenerate evidence after repairs
scenarios.command_or_harness: git status, git rev-parse, fresh xcodebuild/simctl/static scans
scenarios.expected_signal: Current evidence references current branch and no unresolved tracked product source dirt
scenarios.actual_result: Evidence regenerated after commits through 5ee66f8687f3dc8311605b2a4611f5533fdb5b1d; pending evidence files are intentional
scenarios.cleanup_status: Intentional evidence remains uncommitted until FG-001/FG-003 commits

scenarios.user_or_attacker_model: Tool prints SUCCESS but exits non-zero
scenarios.setup: Subagent temporary wrapper around failing shell command
scenarios.command_or_harness: bash -c 'echo SUCCESS...; exit 7' classified by exit code
scenarios.expected_signal: Non-zero exit is not accepted as success
scenarios.actual_result: Subagent reported underlying exit=7 classified as non-success

scenarios.user_or_attacker_model: Operator installs and opens the built app
scenarios.setup: Fresh Debug simulator build, install, launch, screenshot
scenarios.command_or_harness: xcodebuild build; simctl install; simctl launch; simctl io screenshot
scenarios.expected_signal: Exit 0 commands and screenshot showing v1.1 Route Kits surface without internal QA toolbar
scenarios.actual_result: simctl runtime log exists and screenshot captured
scenarios.cleanup_status: DerivedData in /tmp may be removed; durable screenshot/log retained

scenarios.setup: Record git status before/after evidence generation
scenarios.expected_signal: Only intentional docs/evidence files are dirty before evidence commits
scenarios.actual_result: No tracked product files dirty after commits except current intentional evidence/checklist files
scenarios.cleanup_status: Will be clean after evidence/verdict commits
